CVE-2020-28477.title: This affects all versions of package immer.
CVE-2020-28477.summary: This affects all versions of package immer.

CVE-2021-23436.title: This affects the package immer before 9.0.6. A type confusion vul ...
CVE-2021-23436.summary: This affects the package immer before 9.0.6. A type confusion vulnerability can lead to a bypass of CVE-2020-28477 when the user-provided keys used in the path parameter are arrays. In particular, this bypass is possible because the condition (p === "__proto__" || p === "constructor") in applyPatches_ returns false if p is ['__proto__'] (or ['constructor']). The === operator (strict equality operator) returns false if the operands have different type.

CVE-2021-3757.title: immer is vulnerable to Improperly Controlled Modification of Obje ...
CVE-2021-3757.summary: immer is vulnerable to Improperly Controlled Modification of Object Prototype Attributes ('Prototype Pollution')
